name: Russell Brand

acts.description: Four women alleged rape, sexual assault, and emotional abuse in Channel 4 / Sunday Times investigation

behavior_summary: 2023 Channel 4 documentary and Sunday Times investigation featured four women alleging rape and sexual assault. He denied all claims. His YouTube/Rumble audience largely rallied to his defense, framing it as political persecution.

art.summary: Charismatic comedian and actor who reinvented himself as a conspiracy-adjacent political commentator before the allegations.

verdict.blurb: Spent years building a brand around spiritual awakening and authentic truth-telling, then four women accused him of rape. He responded by telling his followers it was a mainstream media conspiracy. It's always a conspiracy.
